prompt: Transform the editor background into a dynamic galaxy theme, with stars subtly moving across the screen.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1. Transform the large dark gray background panel displaying the code and the dark gray terminal panel below it in image 1 into a dynamic galaxy theme. The galaxy should feature stars that appear to be subtly moving across these background regions.
objects: Top menu bar (File, Edit, Selection, etc.)
Left sidebar (Explorer: WORKSPACE with file tree)
Code editor area with a dynamic galaxy theme background
Code text displayed on the galaxy background
Terminal panel area with a dynamic galaxy theme background
Terminal content displayed on the galaxy background
Subtly moving stars within the galaxy theme
Bottom status bar (dev/real-estate, Ln 1, Col 1, etc.)
